_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Unreal Tournament 2004 (OldUnreal)
author: contact@rubberverse.xyz
description: Unreal Tournament 2004 (often abbreviated to simply UT2004) is a first-person arena shooter video game developed by Epic Games and Digital Extremes. Part of the Unreal franchise, it is the third game in the Unreal Tournament series and an updated rerelease of Unreal Tournament 2003. This egg makes use of a modified OldUnreal Linux install script. By using this egg, you accept Epic Games Terms of Service agreement. Icon by Epic Games.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

cd /mnt/server

# Grab UT2004 installer from OldUnreal
echo "Grabbing UT2004 installer..."
curl -o install-title.sh https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MrRubberDucky/test/refs/heads/main/setup/install-ut2004.sh
chmod +x ./install-title.sh

# Install UT2004
echo "Installing UT2004..."
./install-title.sh -d /mnt/server --ui-mode none --application-entry skip --desktop-shortcut skip --no-keep-installer-files

# Entrypoint script + Configuration
echo "Grabbing start script and configuration file..."
curl -o /mnt/server/start.sh https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MrRubberDucky/test/refs/heads/main/setup/start-ut2004.sh
curl -o /mnt/server/System/UT2004.ini https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MrRubberDucky/test/refs/heads/main/setup/UT2004.ini

# set permissions
echo "Fixing permissions..."
find /mnt/server/ -type d -exec chmod 755 {} +
find /mnt/server/ -type f -exec chmod 644 {} +
chmod +x /mnt/server/System/ucc-bin
chmod +x /mnt/server/start.sh

cd /mnt/server || exit
export HOME=/mnt/server

## install end
echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: Game Password
variables.description: Password that will be required when joining your UT2k4 server. Leave "" for no password.

variables.name: Game Port
variables.description: What port to run server on? Query Port will be +1 of this value and GameSpy Query port will be +10 of this value. Protocol: UDP

variables.name: Map Name
variables.description: Valid map name. Make sure it matches Gamemode to avoid oddities, or crashes. Example: ONS-Torlan

variables.name: Mutators
variables.description: Set game modifiers (mutators) here. Can be custom.

variables.name: WebAdmin Port
variables.description: Port for WebAdmin to listen on. Protocol: TCP (HTTP)
